The latest announcement is out from Frontage Holdings Corp. ( (HK:1521) ).

Frontage Holdings Corporation, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, announced a delay in the dispatch of a circular related to a major and connected transaction involving a Share Transfer Agreement. The circular, which includes vital information such as financial details and recommendations for shareholders, was initially expected to be sent by November 20, 2025, but will now be dispatched by December 24, 2025, due to the need for additional time to finalize its contents.

data.title: Elliptic Labs CEO Increases Stake, Signaling Confidence in Company’s Future
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Elliptic Laboratories AS ( (DE:EIP) ) has issued an update.

Ola Tviberg Sandstad, the CEO of Elliptic Laboratories ASA, has purchased 24,000 shares of the company, reflecting confidence in its future. This move may positively impact the company’s market perception and stakeholder confidence, as it demonstrates leadership’s commitment to the company’s growth and success.

More about Elliptic Laboratories AS

Elliptic Laboratories AS is a company specializing in AI Virtual Smart Sensor technology, which enhances user experiences by bringing contextual intelligence to devices. Their platform, deployed in over 500 million devices, uses proprietary deep neural networks to improve personalization, privacy, and productivity. Headquartered in Norway, with a presence in the USA, China, South Korea, Taiwan, and Japan, Elliptic Labs is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

Anax Metals Limited ( (AU:ANX) ) has provided an announcement.

Anax Metals Limited has announced a general meeting of shareholders to be held on December 19, 2025, in West Perth, Western Australia. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in the meeting either in person or by proxy, with important resolutions to be discussed, including a transaction deemed fair and reasonable by an independent expert. data.title: 4DS Memory Faces Internal Governance Challenge with Invalid Director Removal Notice
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

The latest update is out from 4DS Memory ( (AU:4DS) ).

4DS Memory Limited has received an invalid notice from three shareholders seeking to remove a director, Mr. David McAuliffe, under sections 203D and 249D of the Corporations Act. The company has informed the requisitioning shareholders of the invalidity of the notice and stated that no general meeting will be convened unless valid notices are received. This development highlights internal challenges within the company, potentially impacting its governance and stakeholder relations.

More about 4DS Memory

4DS Memory Limited is a semiconductor technology company based in Silicon Valley, specializing in high bandwidth, high endurance, persistent non-volatile memory for advanced CMOS process nodes. The company is known for its Interface Switching ReRAM technology, which offers tuneable persistence and low energy per bit, catering to compute-intensive and AI processor applications. Established in 2007, 4DS holds a portfolio of 34 USA patents and is a pioneer in developing PCMO ReRAM on advanced CMOS processing nodes.

Average Trading Volume: 26,490,748

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$20.61M
